# @vaed-ai/cyto

> React components for Cytoscape.js — declarative graph nodes with React content inside.

## Install

```bash
npm install @vaed-ai/cyto cytoscape cytoscape-cola react-cytoscapejs
```

## Usage

```tsx
import { Cyto, CytoNode, CytoEdge, CytoStyle } from '@vaed-ai/cyto'

function Graph() {
  return (
    <div style={{ position: 'relative', height: 400 }}>
      <Cyto>
        <CytoNode id="a" element={{ data: { id: 'a', label: 'A' } }} />
        <CytoNode id="b" element={{ data: { id: 'b', label: 'B' } }} />
        <CytoEdge element={{ id: 'e1', data: { id: 'e1', source: 'a', target: 'b' } }} />
      </Cyto>
    </div>
  )
}
```

Wrap `<Cyto>` in a container with `position: relative` and a defined height. The component fills its parent absolutely.

## Components

- `<Cyto>` — Main container. Renders Cytoscape canvas + overlay for React nodes. Props: `layout`, `style`, `className`, `onLoaded`.
- `<CytoNode>` — Adds a node. Pass `children` to render React content inside. Props: `id`, `element` (data, position, classes, locked, grabbable), `onClick`.
- `<CytoEdge>` — Adds an edge between two nodes. Ghost nodes created automatically for ordering. Props: `element` (id, data with source/target, classes).
- `<CytoStyle>` — Declarative stylesheet. Supports CSS variables via `var(--name)` which are resolved at runtime via `getComputedStyle`. Props: `stylesheet`.
- `useGraph()` — Hook returning `{ cy, cyRef, relayout, layout }`.
- `CytoContext` — React context for the Cytoscape instance.

## Layout

Cola force-directed layout runs by default with sensible defaults:
- `refresh: 10`, `maxSimulationTime: 100`, `fit: false`
- `edgeLength` scales with node connectivity
- Debounced relayout (300ms) on every `node:add` event
- Custom layout: pass `layout` prop to `<Cyto>`

## React Content Inside Nodes

```tsx
<CytoNode id="card" element={{ data: { id: 'card' } }}>
  <div style={{ padding: 16, background: '#fff', borderRadius: 8 }}>
    <h3>Title</h3>
    <p>Any React content</p>
  </div>
</CytoNode>
```

Nodes with children render via Portal into an overlay div that tracks Cytoscape viewport (pan/zoom). ResizeObserver syncs node dimensions.

## Grab Mechanics

- Add class `cyto-grab` to make React content draggable (forwards mousedown to canvas)
- Add class `cyto-no-grab` to block grab propagation on specific elements
- Interactive elements (`input`, `button`, `select`, `textarea`, `a`, `label`, `contenteditable`) are automatically excluded from grab

## CSS Variables in Stylesheets

Cytoscape doesn't natively support CSS custom properties. `@vaed-ai/cyto` resolves `var(--name)` values via `getComputedStyle(document.documentElement)` before passing to Cytoscape:

```tsx
<CytoStyle stylesheet={[{
  selector: 'node',
  style: {
    'background-color': 'var(--my-color)',  // resolved at runtime
    'color': 'var(--my-text)',
  }
}]} />
```

## Docs

- [Live examples](https://vaed-ai.github.io/cyto)
- [GitHub](https://github.com/vaed-ai/cyto)
